title: Bardins Jewellers – More than just jewellery
description: BUSINESS NEWS - For over a century, Bardins...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - For over a century, Bardins Jewellers has been part of Mossel Bay’s story. Since opening our doors in 1903, our promise has remained the same: to offer honest value, timeless quality, and the kind of personal service that makes every customer feel like family.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - For over a century, Bardins Jewellers has been part of Mossel Bay’s story. Since opening our doors in 1903, our promise has remained the same: to offer honest value, timeless quality, and the kind of personal service that makes every customer feel like family."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"When you visit Bardins Jewellers at Langeberg Mall, you’re not just shopping – you’re building memories."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Whether it’s helping you choose the perfect engagement ring, celebrating a milestone anniversary, or breathing new life into a treasured heirloom, we take pride in being part of life’s special moments.","html":"Whether it’s helping you choose the perfect engagement ring, celebrating a milestone anniversary, or breathing new life into a treasured heirloom, we take pride in being part of life’s special moments."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We also provide a trusted service in buying old gold. If you have jewellery you no longer wear, bring it to us for a fair and professional evaluation.","html":"We also provide a trusted service in buying old gold. If you have jewellery you no longer wear, bring it to us for a fair and professional evaluation."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"At Bardins Jewellers, relationships matter just as much as craftsmanship. That’s why generations of families continue to place their trust in us – and why we look forward to serving you for many more years to come.","html":"At Bardins Jewellers, relationships matter just as much as craftsmanship. That’s why generations of families continue to place their trust in us – and why we look forward to serving you for many more years to come."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Shop 27, Langeberg Mall, Mossel Bay044 695 2892www.bardins.co.za","html":"Shop 27, Langeberg Mall, Mossel Bay
044 695 2892
www.bardins.co.za"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Bardins Jewellers","html":"Bardins Jewellers"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Timeless quality and craftsmanship.","html":"Timeless quality and craftsmanship."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
